text:
**Kafka side (interface definitions):** In `apache/kafka` under `clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/serialization/`, two interfaces define the serialization boundary: `Serializer<T>` (converts objects to bytes) and `Deserializer<T>` (converts bytes to objects). Both extend `Closeable` and provide `configure()`, the core `serialize()`/`deserialize()` methods, and header-aware overloads.

**Flink side (implementations/wrappers):** The `flink-connector-kafka` module (found on the `release-1.16` branch of `apache/flink` — it was later extracted to a separate repo) contains several files that bridge Kafka's `Deserializer` into Flink's `DeserializationSchema` world:

| File | Class | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `KafkaDeserializationSchema.java` | `KafkaDeserializationSchema<T>` (interface) | Flink-side interface that accepts Kafka `ConsumerRecord<byte[],byte[]>` — defines the contract for deserializing Kafka records in Flink |
| `KafkaDeserializationSchemaWrapper.java` (internals) | `KafkaDeserializationSchemaWrapper<T>` (implements `KafkaDeserializationSchema`) | Wraps a Flink `DeserializationSchema<T>` to satisfy the `KafkaDeserializationSchema` interface (legacy consumer path) |
| `KafkaRecordDeserializationSchema.java` | `KafkaRecordDeserializationSchema<T>` (interface) | New-source-API interface; has static factory methods `of()` and `valueOnly()` that accept either a `KafkaDeserializationSchema` or a Kafka `Deserializer` class |
| `KafkaDeserializationSchemaWrapper.java` (deserializer pkg) | `KafkaDeserializationSchemaWrapper<T>` (implements `KafkaRecordDeserializationSchema`) | Adapts a legacy `KafkaDeserializationSchema` to the new `KafkaRecordDeserializationSchema` interface |
| `KafkaValueOnlyDeserializerWrapper.java` | `KafkaValueOnlyDeserializerWrapper<T>` (implements `KafkaRecordDeserializationSchema`) | **Directly wraps Kafka's `Deserializer<T>`** — instantiates and calls `Deserializer.deserialize(topic, value)` at line 91, bridging the Kafka serialization API into Flink |
| `DynamicKafkaDeserializationSchema.java` | `DynamicKafkaDeserializationSchema` (implements `KafkaDeserializationSchema<RowData>`) | Table/SQL layer implementation that handles key/value projection and metadata extraction from `ConsumerRecord` |
